notes: Multiple independent sources (Aspen's own locator, Yelp, BBB, Birdeye, chamberofcommerce.com) place this exact address (16473 W 159th St, Lockport IL 60441) under the Aspen Dental brand with matching phone (815) 221-4200 - no name collision. Aspen Dental is a nationally branded, PE-backed DSO managed by Aspen Dental Management Inc (Leonard Green & Partners), so branded_dso/pe_backed is genuinely supported and not a dentist-owned group. The stealth_dso tier is contradicted. 'ACDI' (A Center for Dental Implants) was a dentist-OWNED multi-location implant group founded/owned by Dr. James D'Alise (a dentist), not a corporate/PE management company; it collapsed after D'Alise's license was revoked in 2018 (Oak Brook flagship closed). The 1288 Rickert Dr address now operates as 'Naperville Crossings Dental,' legally 'David Chang DDS Ltd' — an independent solo dentist-owned general practice (Dr. David Chang, DDS, ADA/ISDS member), with pediatric dentist Dr. Bassel Dulli also in the suite; no parent company, DSO, or PE appears in any listing. The claim's only corporate signal — a shared non-dentist CFO (Zuzana Vitkova) named as authorized official across D'Alise's location-LLCs — is normal administrative structure for a dentist owning multiple subsidiary LLCs and is not evidence of a stealth DSO. Targeted DSO/PE-controller searches returned nothing.

Smile Doctors is a confirmed PE-backed orthodontic DSO (Thomas H. Lee Partners + Linden Capital, closed Dec 2021), so the branded_dso + pe_backed classification is genuinely supported; not dentist-owned (friendly-PC veneer) and no name collision (exact street match).
